title: Rine Time
description: Explore | Choose Your Class | Battle Challenging Mobs | Build | Decorate | Grow Crops | Automate Everything
body:
**Explore** new dimensions and improved biomes with enhanced terrain generation.

**Choose Your Class** and equip new weapons to suit your playstyle.

**Battle Challenging Mobs** new and familiar, ready to provide fights that keep you on your toes.

**Build** using a broad range of blocks to bring you creations to life.

**Decorate** with new design elements to personalize your space.

**Grow Crops** using expanded farming and cooking systems to sustain you on your adventures.

**Automate Everything** with advanced machinery to empower your worlds.

All with optimized performance and quality-of-life tweaks to make gameplay smooth and fun.
